src: One UI is all done with chatgpt web, midjourney, gpts,suno,luma,runway,viggle,flux,ideogram,realtime,pika,udio; Simultaneous support  Web / PWA / Linux / Win / MacOS platform
ja: ChatGPT Web、Midjourney、GPTs、Suno、Luma、Runway、Viggle、Flux、Ideogram、Realtime、Pika、Udioをひとつのうで統合。Web / PWA / Linux / Win / MacOSに同時対応。
